name: Product Details & Catalog Entities
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In Maropost Commerce Cloud, products are managed through a structured "},{"text":"Product Details","bold":true},{"text":" page. This page combines all core catalog entities into an intuitive layout, allowing merchants to manage product information, availability, pricing, SEO, and custom data from one place."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Below is an overview of each section, aligned with the actual UI sequence in Commerce Cloud."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"1. General Information"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This section contains the "},{"text":"core identification and descriptive details","bold":true},{"text":" for your product. It defines what the product is, how it is titled, and the basic content customers will see."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can add a "},{"text":"subtitle","bold":true},{"text":" for a tagline, toggle whether the product can be discounted, and choose the "},{"text":"sales channels","bold":true},{"text":" it will be available in — for example, your online store, a POS location, or a marketplace integration."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Fields include:","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Title","bold":true},{"text":" – The product name shown in the storefront."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"SKU","bold":true},{"text":" – Unique identifier for the default variant (if no variants are created)."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Subtitle","bold":true},{"text":" – Optional secondary title or tagline."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Description","bold":true},{"text":" – Rich text editor for product details, features, and marketing copy."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Product Status","bold":true},{"text":" – Published (visible in the storefront) or Unpublished (hidden)."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Sales Channels","bold":true},{"text":" – Select where the product is sold (Online Store, POS, Marketplaces)."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Discountable toggle","bold":true},{"text":" – Determines whether discounts can be applied.\n"}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/BB27RF407CFS/765c9b73-5ca1-4c18-a2c5-2fc5f106eb0a.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/BB27RF407CFS/765c9b73-5ca1-4c18-a2c5-2fc5f106eb0a.png","name":"765c9b73-5ca1-4c18-a2c5-2fc5f106eb0a.png","type":"image/png","size":3917136,"width":2560,"height":1438,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FBB27RF407CFS%2F765c9b73-5ca1-4c18-a2c5-2fc5f106eb0a.png","active":true,"mediaID":1170,"dateInserted":"2025-10-27T10:22:17+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" If you sell different versions of a product (such as multiple sizes or colors), you can decide whether to treat it as a single product or enable "},{"text":"variants","bold":true},{"text":". If “Yes, this is a product with variants” is enabled, the product will support multiple "},{"text":"variant configurations","bold":true},{"text":" using attributes like size, color, or material."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In case of multiple variant option, the system will automatically create each variation, based on the details provided. "}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/TLFR0NEIVCX5/a0df6f5f-6560-4f25-8f25-d9064d7831c4.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/TLFR0NEIVCX5/a0df6f5f-6560-4f25-8f25-d9064d7831c4.png","name":"a0df6f5f-6560-4f25-8f25-d9064d7831c4.png","type":"image/png","size":175770,"width":2322,"height":1496,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FTLFR0NEIVCX5%2Fa0df6f5f-6560-4f25-8f25-d9064d7831c4.png","active":true,"mediaID":1171,"dateInserted":"2025-10-27T10:23:06+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/94N8MK34YTVT/bd8efa63-f269-43a8-a53a-c6fd63ad4805.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/94N8MK34YTVT/bd8efa63-f269-43a8-a53a-c6fd63ad4805.png","name":"bd8efa63-f269-43a8-a53a-c6fd63ad4805.png","type":"image/png","size":3388601,"width":2364,"height":1494,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F94N8MK34YTVT%2Fbd8efa63-f269-43a8-a53a-c6fd63ad4805.png","active":true,"mediaID":1172,"dateInserted":"2025-10-27T10:23:32+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"2. Attributes"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Attributes define the "},{"text":"product characteristics","bold":true},{"text":" that differentiate variants. They are essential when selling products with multiple options."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For example, a "},{"text":"Type","bold":true},{"text":" field might specify “Charger,” while a "},{"text":"Material","bold":true},{"text":" field lists “Plastic.” Dimensions such as height, width, and weight can be entered for logistics and shipping purposes. "}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/UBW5Q45S0HC2/a417e1c8-447c-40fc-aefc-85b3d63993df.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/UBW5Q45S0HC2/a417e1c8-447c-40fc-aefc-85b3d63993df.png","name":"a417e1c8-447c-40fc-aefc-85b3d63993df.png","type":"image/png","size":3858109,"width":2560,"height":1440,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FUBW5Q45S0HC2%2Fa417e1c8-447c-40fc-aefc-85b3d63993df.png","active":true,"mediaID":1183,"dateInserted":"2025-10-27T10:33:13+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"bold":true,"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"Shipping Attributes:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Height, Width, Length, Weight","bold":true},{"text":" – Physical dimensions for shipping and display."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"MID Code","bold":true},{"text":" – Manufacturer Identification Code"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"HS Code ","bold":true},{"text":"– Internationally standardized numerical code used to classify traded products."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Country of Origin","bold":true},{"text":" – Country where a product is manufactured/produced"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can also assign "},{"text":"brands","bold":true},{"text":", "},{"text":"tags","bold":true},{"text":", and connect the product to "},{"text":"categories","bold":true},{"text":" under “Organise” for internal organization or to "},{"text":"collections","bold":true},{"text":" for storefront merchandising."}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Type - ","bold":true},{"text":"General category or nature of the product"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Material - ","bold":true},{"text":"Primary substance or composition of the product"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Brand - ","bold":true},{"text":"Name of the company or trademark under which the product is sold"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Tags","bold":true},{"text":" – Keywords to support search and filtering."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Collections","bold":true},{"text":" – Customer-facing groups powered by rules or manual selection."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Categories","bold":true},{"text":" – Internal classification for catalog Inventory"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The Inventory section controls "},{"text":"stock tracking and purchasing logic","bold":true},{"text":" for the product. If you enable inventory management, the system will track quantities and automatically adjust them when sales, returns, or manual updates happen."}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"Note:"},{"text":" If variants are enabled, inventory can be managed individually per variant."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"Inventory-related fields:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"EAN (Barcode)","bold":true},{"text":" – European Article Number for scanning and tracking."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"UPC (Barcode)","bold":true},{"text":" – Universal Product Code."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Barcode","bold":true},{"text":" – Alternate identifier for product scanning."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Allow backorders","bold":true},{"text":" toggle – Allows purchases even when stock is depleted."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Stock table","bold":true},{"text":" – Lists location-specific inventory quantities (e.g., Sydney – 100 units, Epping/Victoria/VIC – 100 units)."}]}]}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/X6KQGUARFMJL/screenshot-2025-08-14-at-3-14-55-e2-80-afam.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/X6KQGUARFMJL/screenshot-2025-08-14-at-3-14-55-e2-80-afam.png","name":"Screenshot 3.14.55 AM.png","type":"image/png","size":1294640,"width":2874,"height":1620,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FX6KQGUARFMJL%2Fscreenshot-2025-08-14-at-3-14-55-e2-80-afam.png","active":true,"mediaID":1185,"dateInserted":"2025-10-27T10:35:13+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"4. Pricing"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You set the base price here, and if needed, you can use promotions tab to set pricing or discounts conditions. This is useful if you want to sell at a different price in a physical store versus online, or in different marketplaces."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"MCC let you create "},{"text":"discount campaigns","bold":true},{"text":" for specific products, customer groups, or entire orders. These can be amount-based, percentage-based, or provide free shipping."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"5. SEO Settings"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"SEO settings determine how your product appears in "},{"text":"search engine results","bold":true},{"text":" and storefront URLs. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can enter a meta title and description — both of which should include relevant keywords to improve discoverability — and customize the "},{"text":"URL handle","bold":true},{"text":" to make it short, readable, and SEO-friendly (e.g., "},{"text":"/fast-charger","code":true},{"text":" instead of "},{"text":"/product123","code":true},{"text":")."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Optimizing these fields helps search engines understand your product, making it more likely to appear for the right audience."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Fields include:","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Title","bold":true},{"text":" – Meta title for SEO (can be different from storefront title)."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Meta Description","bold":true},{"text":" – Search engine description snippet."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"URL Handle","bold":true},{"text":" – Customizable part of the product URL (e.g., "},{"text":"/adapter","code":true},{"text":")."}]}]}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/9Y6GFU3DOCLU/2a4786e6-1dff-46c2-80ce-682dc3b4116b-281-29.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/9Y6GFU3DOCLU/2a4786e6-1dff-46c2-80ce-682dc3b4116b-281-29.png","name":"2a4786e6-1dff-46c2-80ce-682dc3b4116b Use relevant keywords in the SEO title and description to improve product visibility in search results."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"6. Custom Fields"}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"6.1 Product Custom Field:"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Custom Fields allow merchants to "},{"text":"store additional, business-specific data","bold":true},{"text":" beyond the standard Commerce Cloud fields. You can choose from several field types, such as short text, long text, date, number, decimal, or true/false. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Example fields from UI:","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"IsForSale","code":true},{"text":" – Boolean field indicating if the product is currently for sale."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"IsExpired","code":true},{"text":" – Boolean field marking whether the product listing has expired."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"SAT","code":true},{"text":" – Could be used for internal compliance or supplier reference codes."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"VAT","code":true},{"text":" – Can store applicable tax percentage or code."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"STORE","code":true},{"text":" – Indicates in which store the product is available. "}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In your setup, for example, you might use "},{"text":"IsForSale","code":true},{"text":" or "},{"text":"IsExpired","code":true},{"text":" to control product availability logic, or store tax codes like "},{"text":"VAT","code":true},{"text":" and supplier identifiers like "},{"text":"SAT","code":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Availability rules let you control which channels see these fields, and you can set them to active or inactive depending on whether they’re currently in use."}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":" ","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"6.2 Custom Field Settings:"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In addition to adding custom fields on a product record, Maropost Commerce Cloud lets you "},{"text":"define global custom fields in Settings","bold":true},{"text":". These fields can then be applied consistently across multiple entities in your catalog and order flow."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Where Custom Fields Can Be Applied (Levels)"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"When creating a custom field, you choose the "},{"text":"Level","bold":true},{"text":". This defines which type of entity the field attaches to:"}]},{"type":"table","children":[{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"th","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Level","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"th","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Description","bold":true}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Product","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Fields specific to the product itself (e.g., Warranty Info, Care Instructions)."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Variants","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Fields tied to product variants (e.g., Batch Code, Size Guide)."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Collections","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Fields applied to product groupings (e.g., Campaign ID, Seasonal used on category structures (e.g., Display Banner, SEO that apply to order records (e.g., Gift Wrap, Delivery Preference)."}]}]}]}],"id":"table-1-56","colSizes":[300,300]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Supported "},{"text":"Example: Model No.","italic":true}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Text","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Longer descriptive text. "},{"text":"Example: Care instructions.","italic":true}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Date","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Date selector. "},{"text":"Example: Expiry date, Launch date.","italic":true}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Integer Number","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Whole numbers only. "},{"text":"Example: Warranty (years), Item count.","italic":true}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Decimal Number","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Numbers with decimals. "},{"text":"Example: Alcohol % content, Weight (kg).","italic":true}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"True/False","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Boolean values. "},{"text":"Example: IsPreOrderAvailable (Yes/No), IsFragile (Yes/No).","italic":true}]}]}]}],"id":"table-0-59","colSizes":[300,300]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" For example: If you want to create a custom field for the store availability of the product, you can create multi-select option to indicate its availability.
